faqs.question: Why are silverfish so common in Hoboken homes?
faqs.answer: Hoboken's high humidity from its waterfront location, combined with many older buildings with basements and aging plumbing, creates perfect conditions for silverfish. These pests thrive in damp, dark areas and are especially common in pre-war buildings and brownstones throughout the city.
